description: Brand-new, ultra-modern corner unit 3-bedroom + Den, 2.5-bath townhome backing onto a protected lush greenbelt. The bright, airy main level features 9'ceilings, Fisher & Paykel appliances, motorized blinds, and a kitchen made for cooking enthusiasts with a gas cooktop, quartz countertops, and ample storage in custom cabinetry. The Park Landmark features a playground surrounded by nature and private amenity building perfect for events. This unit features a spacious double garage with rough in EV. Just a short drive to Hyland Elementary and Sullivan Heights Secondary, and minutes to Newton Town Centre, shops, parks, transit, and major amenities. Open house on Mar 6,7, & 8 from 12-4pm
